creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
Update to 0.4.1 instead. :-)

--- 2010-06-18b-luckybackup.diff begins here ---
diff -ruN luckybackup.orig/Makefile luckybackup/Makefile
--- luckybackup.orig/Makefile	2010-06-13 06:02:30.000000000 -0400
+++ luckybackup/Makefile	2010-06-18 04:09:48.000000000 -0400
@@ -5,8 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/luckybackup/Makefile,v 1.6 2010/03/28 06:43:58 dinoex Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	luckybackup
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.5
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/source
 
@@ -23,6 +22,9 @@
 MAN8=		luckybackup.8
 MANCOMPRESSED=	yes
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/license/gpl.txt
+
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 post-patch:
diff -ruN luckybackup.orig/distinfo luckybackup/distinfo
--- luckybackup.orig/distinfo	2010-06-13 06:02:30.000000000 -0400
+++ luckybackup/distinfo	2010-06-18 03:56:54.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

-SIZE (luckybackup-0.3.5.tar.gz) = 3258563
+MD5 (luckybackup-0.4.1.tar.gz) = 14c2d65cd5626a118401771d6230cac2

+SIZE (luckybackup-0.4.1.tar.gz) = 5336715
